ai_coach.headline: Match Day fueling (3500 kcal / 500g carbs) is set, but zero telemetry or logs have synced yet today -- get data flowing before kickoff.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, RHR, or body battery data has synced, so readiness can't be scored objectively. Treat this as an unknown-recovery match day: warm up thoroughly and let subjective feel gate your first few sprints before committing to full intensity.
action_plan: Log last night's sleep and morning HRV/RHR as soon as your wearable syncs so today's readiness can be assessed.
Front-load 60% of the 500g carb target (~300g) into pre- and post-match meals, split around warm-up and cool-down.
Hydrate 3.5-4.0 L today, and add +1.0 L with full electrolytes given the match/sprint output expected.
Log the match session in Hevy/tracker immediately post-game so load and PRs stay current.
Keep any Zone 2 work strictly conversational -- save max-velocity efforts for actual match sprints only.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Hit 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carbs / 71g fat today, putting ~300g of the carbs into pre- and post-match meals per the 60% pacing rule; add the +1.0 L electrolyte fluid bump on top of the 3.5-4.0 L baseline.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entries or glide-path history are logged yet, so trend vs. the 83.0 kg target can't be assessed -- log a weigh-in to re-anchor the curve.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry (sleep, HRV, RHR, body battery) synced -- readiness is a blind spot on a high-output match day.
Gym adherence sits at 0/4 scheduled days this cycle -- confirm this is intentional taper for match day and not slipping consistency.
No weight or nutrition logs yet today -- glide-path and macro tracking will be inaccurate until entries land.

overview.summary: Every core telemetry stream (weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, battery) is empty for today, so there's no objective read on where you stand going into the match.
overview.suggestion: Sync your wearable and log a quick morning weigh-in before warm-up so today's read isn't a total blank.

plan.summary: No weight history or glide-path points exist yet, so progress toward the 83.0 kg target and phase milestones can't be evaluated right now.
plan.suggestion: Log today's weight to re-establish a data point on the glide path.

training.summary: Readiness and load scores are both null, and gym adherence is 0/4 this cycle -- there's nothing to cross-reference for today's match intensity.
training.suggestion: Run a short dynamic warm-up and use the first 10 minutes of play as a live readiness check before opening up to full sprint effort.

gym.summary: No gym session data has been logged at all, so there's nothing to assess against your split or PRs.
gym.suggestion: Log your next lifting session in Hevy as soon as it happens so bar-velocity tracking and PRs stay current.

sleep.summary: Last night's sleep and the 90-day history are both empty, so quality and stress/body-battery trend can't be read today.
sleep.suggestion: Get your sleep tracker syncing today so tonight's post-match recovery data is captured.

nutrition.summary: Nothing has been logged yet against the 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carb / 71g fat Match Day target.
nutrition.suggestion: Log your pre-match meal now, aiming for roughly 150g of the day's carbs in that single sitting to front-load the 60% pacing rule.
